name: Data Model
content:
erDiagram
    USER ||--o{ ACCOUNT : has
    USER ||--o{ TRANSACTION_ACCESS : grants
    USER ||--o{ TRANSACTION : contains
    ACCOUNT ||--o{ TRANSACTION : has
    TRANSACTION_ACCESS ||--|| ACCOUNT : restricts_to
    TRANSACTION_ACCESS ||--|| USER : granted_to

    USER {
        int user_id PK
        string email
        string name
    }

    ACCOUNT {
        int account_id PK
        int user_id FK
        string account_name
        decimal balance
    }

    TRANSACTION {
        int transaction_id PK
        int account_id FK
        decimal amount
        string description
        datetime date
    }

    TRANSACTION_ACCESS {
        int access_id PK
        int owner_user_id FK
        int granted_to_user_id FK
        int account_id FK "null means all accounts"
        datetime granted_date
        string access_type "read-only"
    }
